n: Book 12, Chapter 2: Too Near to Dunharrow

steps.t: Horn is by the entrance to Underharrow. Ellen Fremedon has made her displeasure clear to you, and has nothing else to say.
Orcs and Wargs can be found throughout Harrowdale. Horn wants you to collect Orc sigils and Warg teeth from the invaders throughout Harrowdale.
Ellen Fremedon is outside the Mead Hall of Underharrow, in Kingstead. You have collected Orc sigils and Warg teeth and should bring them to Ellen Frem…
Horn is at the entrance to Underharrow, in Kingstead. You have impressed Ellen Fremedon with your selfless actions on her behalf, and should let Horn …
